expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly covers REPORT_STATE definitions and deterministic resume semantics: it cites REPORT_STATE values (FINAL_EXISTS, DRAFT_EXISTS, CONTEXT_ONLY, FRESH) and their meanings, and describes user-choice-driven routing via scripts/apply_user_choice.sh with modes full_regenerate/smart_refresh/reuse ("Phase 0 enforces deterministic resume/reuse semantics through an explicit script gate").
